Source.Name: openjdk-21
Source.Summary: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 21
Source.Description: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 21. This package includes the JDK, the JRE is not separately provided.

Package.Name: openjdk-21
Package.Summary: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 21
Package.Description: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 21. This package includes the JDK, the JRE is not separately provided.

Package.Name: openjdk-21-devel
Package.Description: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 21. This package includes the JDK, the JRE is not separately provided.
